title: JOIN DONATIONS - 211info
text: JOIN JOIN DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of food, blankets, sleeping bags, tarps, camping equipment, socks, underwear, hats, gloves, jackets, and hygiene items (shampoo, conditioner, razors, deodorant, feminine products, etc.) 1435 NE 81st Avenue Suite 100 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday/Saturday/Sunday 9am-5pm, Tuesday/Thursday 10am-4pm. Closed on national holidays. Email (971) 710-5768 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 232-2031 Main phone (503) 232-7052 Administration (503) 232-4640 FAX Main phone (971) 710-5768 Jacks Volkoff [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, visit website, or email for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 72, 77, and MAX stop at 82nd Avenue Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Camping Gear Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Donation Drop Off Points Food Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - JOIN PDX If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JOIN
